title: v1.18 Endgame
body:
**Release Tracking Board:** [https://github.com/orgs/dapr/projects/98/views/1]()
**Release Planning Issue:** [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/issues/9642]()
**Release lead:** @nelson-parente
**Release lead shadow(s):** TBD
**Performance test lead:** @javier-aliaga
**Longhaul test lead:** @cicoyle
**Build manager:** @mikeee Refer to the [release lifecycle documentation]() for more details. ## Milestone Dates * **Feature definition starts:** March 24th, 2026 * **Feature definition ends:** April 14th, 2026 * **Feature freeze:** April 21st, 2026 * **Code freeze (Endgame starts \~4 weeks stabilization):** April 28th, 2026 * **RC release day:** April 28th, 2026 ✅ (RC1 cut April 29th — context propagation merge gate) * **Release day:** June 11th, 2026 * **Announcement day:** May 26th, 2026 --- ## P0 Status ### \[P0\] Workflow History Propagation (dapr/dapr#9721) — @cicoyle - [X] Proposal merged: [dapr/proposals#102]() - [X] Protos: [dapr/durabletask-protobuf#38]() (merged Apr 28) - [X] durabletask-go: [dapr/durabletask-go#85]() (merged Apr 28) - [X] Runtime: [dapr/dapr#9810]() (merged Apr 29) - [X] Runtime: integrate signing in @JoshVanL - [ ] SDKs - [X] [dotnet issue]() & [dotnet PR]() - [X] [java issue]() - [ ] P1 [js issue]() - [X] [python issue]() @acroca - [X] [rust issue]() - [X] Docs: [PR]() - [X] Quickstarts - [x] dotnet @WhitWaldo doing dotnet jun2 - [X] [java]() @javier-aliaga ### \[P0\] Workflow External Event Timer / HitL (dapr/dapr#9722) — @acroca - [X] Proposal merged: [dapr/proposals#104]() - [X] Protos: [dapr/durabletask-protobuf#34](), [#37]() - [X] durabletask-go: [#80](), [#81](), [#82]() - [X] Runtime - [ ] SDKs - [X] Go SDK - [X] [Python SDK]() - [X] [Java SDK]() - [X] [.NET SDK]() - [ ] P1 JavaScript SDK - [x] CLI: [dapr/cli#1627]() - [ ] Cross-SDK protocol docs note (Albert) — SDK-internal fields contract - [x] [Docs]() ### \[P0\] History Signing (dapr/dapr#9723) — @JoshVanL - [X] Proposal merged: [dapr/proposals#102]() - [X] Protos (base): [dapr/durabletask-protobuf#35]() - [X] durabletask-go (base): [#77]() - [X] Runtime (base): [dapr/dapr#9778]() (merged Apr 23) - [X] Child workflow + activity attestation protos: [dapr/durabletask-protobuf#41]() (merged May 1) - [X] Child workflow + activity attestation runtime: [dapr/dapr#9831]() (open, unblocked since May 1) - [X] durabletask-go child wf attestation: [#87]() - [ ] P1 CLI Commands - [X] Docs ### \[P0\] MCP Server Support (dapr/dapr#9724) — @sicoyle - [X] Protos: [dapr/durabletask-protobuf#39]() - [X] durabletask-go: [#83]() - [X] Runtime: [dapr/dapr#9685](), dapr/dapr#9731 - [X] Docs PR open: [dapr/docs#5129]() - [X] Remove feature gate: [dapr/dapr#9838]() (decision: no feature gates for new opt-in resources) - [ ] Nice-to-have: SDK wrappers (so users dont call `scheduleNewWf` for mcp servers) + quickstarts - [ ] issues linked - [X] [python PR]() - [ ] Docs - [X] Quickstarts - [X] CLI ### \[P0\] Workflow Access Policy (dapr/dapr#9725) — @JoshVanL - [X] Proposal merged: [dapr/proposals#101]() - [X] Runtime: [dapr/dapr#9790]() (merged Apr 27) - [X] Docs: [dapr/docs#5105]() - [X] Extend to all workflow operations: [dapr/dapr#9850]() - [X] Remove feature gate: [dapr/dapr#9838]() - [ ] P1 [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/9884]() --- ## P1 Status ### \[P1\] Migrate DurableTask Repos into SDK Repos (dapr/dapr#9726) — @sicoyle - [X] JavaScript: complete (Sam closed last bit at RC1 review) ### \[P1\] Vector and Search stores — @mikeee - [ ] Proposal: [dapr/proposals#107]() — feedback needed ### \[P1\] Workflow concurrency limits (dapr/dapr#9796) — @JoshVanL - [X] Runtime: [dapr/dapr#9775]() - [X] Docs: [dapr/docs#5109]() - [X] Decision: scheduler-enforced is single source of truth; no SDK changes (existing SDK-side limits guided away from) --- ## Additional Issues ### Implement actor APIs in gRPC ([#927]()) — @acroca - [X] Runtime: [dapr/dapr#9812]() - [X] SDK issues filed - Go: [https://github.com/dapr/go-sdk/issues/827]() - Python: [https://github.com/dapr/python-sdk/issues/1078]() - .NET: [https://github.com/dapr/dotnet-sdk/issues/1842]() - Java: [https://github.com/dapr/java-sdk/issues/1761]() - Javascript: [https://github.com/dapr/js-sdk/issues/833]() - Rust: [https://github.com/dapr/rust-sdk/issues/328]() - [ ] Docs: [https://github.com/dapr/docs/pull/5182]() - [X] Quickstarts issues filed - Go: [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/issues/1321]() - Python: [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/issues/1322]() - .NET: [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/issues/1323]() - Java: [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/issues/1324]() - Javascript: [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/issues/1325]() - Rust: [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/issues/1326]() - [ ] P1 .NET SDK support ### Move subscription hot reload to GA (dapr/dapr#9577) — @javier-aliaga - [X] Runtime: dapr/dapr#9811 - [X] Docs [https://github.com/dapr/docs/pull/5162]() ### Promote Dapr Jobs API to Stable (dapr/dapr#9257) — @cicoyle - [X] Runtime PR 1: [dapr/dapr#9706]() - [X] Runtime PR 2: dapr/dapr#9711 (waiting on perf infra) - [X] SDK work - [X] [dotnet PR open]() - [X] [go-sdk]() - [X] python sdk - [X] java sdk - \[\] js @WhitWaldo - [x] [quickstarts]() - [ ] Docs @cicoyle - [ ] SDK pattern: prefer stable API, fall back to alpha when unimplemented - [ ] issues for Listjobs/purge P1 --- ## Release Tasks ### Code Freeze - [X] Code freeze at: April 28th, 2026 - [X] All P0 issues are resolved or in late-stage review prior to RC1 ### Components Contrib - [X] Check all new components are registered in runtime @sicoyle - [X] Check all new components metadata files are properly updated @sicoyle - [X] Certifications/conformance passing for components - [x] hashi flake. needs to be looked at. - [X] (27/05/26) Contrib cut (d/d update and then update back) - [X] Update certification tests in components-contrib release branch (prior to merge back into master) to use the RC (and Go SDK RC/release if possible) - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/pull/4391]() - [X] [0 critical/high vulnerabilities]() - [X] Cut RC and update dapr/dapr to use it - [ ] Open Docs PR with deprecation notice for postgres v1 @nelson-parente ### dapr/dapr (runtime) - [X] E2E tests passing - [X] Integration tests flakiness addressed - [X] Performance tests are passing - [X] 6/2: perf test failures from may 27 and build failures to investigate - [X] Longhaul tests are passing - [X] Version skew tests are passing - [X] [0 critical/high vulnerabilities]() - [X] Cut RC1 (April 29th, 2026) - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/10023]() - [x] Understand why this is failing [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/actions/runs/26574179662/job/78291382206]() and if its okay to release before fixing this @JoshVanL ### dapr/cli - [X] Tests are passing - [X] [0 critical/high vulnerabilities]() - [X] Cut RC - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/cli/pull/1647]() - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/cli/pull/1641]() --- ### Notifications - [x] Notify users about dapr RCs in [https://discord.com/channels/778680217417809931/1067547446768570458]() - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/releases/tag/v1.18.0-rc.1]() - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/releases/tag/v1.18.0-rc.2]() - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/releases/tag/v1.18.0-rc.3]() - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/releases/tag/v1.18.0-rc.4]() --- ## Validation ### dapr/helm-charts - [x] Validate the upgrade path from the previous release — CRDs updated, no deletion of components/configs etc. - [X] remove refs to the dashboard - [X] [https://github.com/dapr/helm-charts/pull/26]() @yaron2 please merge ### dapr/installer-bundle - [X] Cut RC - [X] Validate RC - [X] remove refs to the dashboard [https://github.com/dapr/installer-bundle/pull/31]() @yaron2 please merge ### SDKs - [X] Update protos and cut RCs for SDKs: - [X] .NET @approvers-dotnet-sdk @maintainers-dotnet-sdk - [X] Java @approvers-java-sdk @maintainers-java-sdk @javier-aliaga - [X] Go @approvers-go-sdk @maintainers-go-sdk @acroca @JoshVanL - [X] Python @approvers-python-sdk @maintainers-python-sdk @acroca - [X] JS (as applicable) @approvers-js-sdk @maintainers-js-sdk - [ ] P1 ~~Rust (as applicable) @approvers-rust-sdk @maintainers-rust-sdk~~ - [ ] P1 ~~C++ (as applicable) @approvers-cpp-sdk @maintainers-cpp-sdk~~ - [X] 0 critical/high vulnerabilities - [X] [.NET]() - [X] [Java]() - [X] [Go]() - [X] [Python]() - [ ] [~~JS~~]() - [ ] [~~Rust~~]() - [ ] [~~C++~~]() **SDK priority order (post-RC1):** 1. Workflow Context Propagation (Cassie filing) 2. Actor gRPC APIs (Albert filing) 3. Jobs API stable (Cassie filing) 4. MCP Server Support wrappers in sdks
Bilgin coordinates dispatch to maintainers. ### Quickstarts @marcduiker @alicejgibbons @atrauzzi - [X] Update quickstarts/tutorials automated validation — covers Linux/K8s/Darwin/MacOS - [X] Point quickstarts to RC of SDKs/dev pkgs - [x] .NET - [x] Workflow context propagation [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/pull/1310]() - [x] Java - [x] Workflow context propagation [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/pull/1319]() - [X] Go - [X] Workflow context propagation [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/pull/1315]() - [x] Python - [x] Workflow context propagation [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/pull/1309]() - [ ] ~~JS (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~Rust (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~C++ (as applicable)~~ - [x] Validate quickstarts on Windows @marcduiker @atrauzzi - [x] Validate quickstarts on Linux ARM64 @marcduiker @atrauzzi - [x] Validate quickstarts on self-hosted @marcduiker @atrauzzi - [x] Validate quickstarts on K8s @marcduiker @atrauzzi ### Longhaul / Metrics - [x] Update longhaul tests with RC of dapr runtime - [x] Validate longhaul metrics ### Milestones and Release Notes - [x] Confirm each repo has milestones set for relevant issues/PRs @nelson-parente - [ ] .NET @maintainers-dotnet-sdk - [ ] Java @maintainers-java-sdk - [ ] Go @maintainers-go-sdk - [ ] Python @maintainers-python-sdk - [ ] @dapr/maintainers-components-contrib - [ ] ~~JS (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~Rust (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~C++ (as applicable)~~ - [X] Generate release notes [https://hackmd.io/SUXWHmZ8QEWaZ2RWM_X9nQ]() - [X] Validate FOSSA on each repo @cicoyle - [X] .NET @maintainers-dotnet-sdk - [X] Java @maintainers-java-sdk - [X] Go @maintainers-go-sdk - [X] Python @maintainers-python-sdk - [ ] ~~JS (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~Rust (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~C++ (as applicable)~~ - [X] Edit and complete release notes HackMD [https://hackmd.io/SUXWHmZ8QEWaZ2RWM_X9nQ]() - [X] PR release notes to dapr/dapr - [ ] Verify release documentation --- ### User feedback - [ ] End user verification of RCs before official release --- ## ETA for above: TBD ## RELEASE DAY: May 26th, 2026 - [X] Validate breaking changes section in release notes - [X] Merge release notes into release branch - [X] Cut tags and publish releases for: - [X] components-contrib - [X] dapr runtime (dapr/dapr) - [X] CLI - [X] Installer bundle - [X] SDKs - [X] .NET - [X] Java - [X] Go - [X] Python - [X] JS (as applicable) - [ ] ~~Rust (as applicable)~~ - [ ] ~~C++ (as applicable)~~ - [X] Quickstarts: create release branch, update image tags, create tag - [ ] Validate DevContainers in key repos (runtime, components-contrib, CLI) - [ ] Update certification tests in components-contrib release branch (prior to merge back into master) to use latest runtime and Go SDK release --- ## ANNOUNCEMENT DAY: May 26th, 2026 - [X] Update supported versions table in docs - [x] Post release announcement in appropriate channels (X, blog, Discord) - [ ] Update E2E tests in CLI to latest runtime version - [ ] Merge (NO SQUASH/AUTO MERGE) release-vX.Y branch back to master for required repos (runtime, components-contrib, CLI) - [ ] Celebrate --- ## POST RELEASE DAY - [ ] Update Dapr K8s Operator on [OperatorHub]() - [ ] Update Dapr [Kratix Marketplace]() - [ ] Update Dapr [Test Containers Module]() - [ ] Update [Dapr Shared]() Updated quickstarts to use released SDKs: - [X] Go - [X] Java - [X] JS - [X] .NET - [ ] ~~Rust~~ - [X] Python ## Repo milestones - [ ] Dapr - [https://github.com/dapr/dapr/milestone/27]() - [ ] CLI - [https://github.com/dapr/cli/milestone/19]() - [ ] Docs - [https://github.com/dapr/docs/milestone/21]() - [ ] Components-contrib - [https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/milestone/tbd]() - [ ] Java-SDK - [https://github.com/dapr/java-sdk/milestone/19]() - [ ] Go-SDK - [https://github.com/dapr/go-sdk/milestone/tbd]() - [ ] Rust-SDK - n/a - [ ] Dashboard - [https://github.com/dapr/dashboard/milestone/tbd]() - [ ] Quickstarts - [https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/milestone/tbd]() ## Grafana Dashboard -
